title: Red Shiny Curling Ribbon, 2 Rolls 5mm Metallic Ribbons for Balloons String Party Shiny Metallic Ribbons for Gift Wrapping Crafting, Bows, Birthday, Christmas, Wedding Party Decorations
features: Red Shiny Curling Ribbon - Including 2 rolls of red shiny metallic curling ribbon set, can be used for gift wrapping, balloons, hand bouquets, wedding decorations, etc., full color to decorate your party

Red Metallic Ribbons Material - Red ribbons are made of durable PVC material, tough and unbreakable, bright and shiny colors, enhancing the festive atmosphere. Suitable for any craft packaging and wedding parties

Shiny Curling Ribbon Design - Our craft ribbons have a rainbow color design on the surface, bright and dazzling colors. You can use scissors to cut the ribbon to the desired length; scraping it with a tool ruler will curl it up

Multicolored Curling Ribbon Size - The red curling ribbon is about 5mm wide and 50 meters/54 yards long, meet your gift wrapping and balloon decoration needs. Ideal for decorative curling ribbons, gift wrap ribbons and craft ribbons

Shiny Ribbon Wide Usage - You can use the shiny red curling ribbon for gift wrapping, bow making, cake decorating, hand bouquets, balloons, weddings, Christmas, graduation, baby shower, bachelorette parties and more
description: Zolunu Red Shiny Curling Ribbon, 2 Rolls 5mm Metallic Ribbons for Balloons String Party Shiny Metallic Ribbons for Gift Wrapping Crafting, Bows, Birthday, Christmas, Wedding Party Decorations Warm Tips: please don't tie the balloon with ribbon directly to avoid air leakage, just use the ribbon to decorate the balloon. Risk of tangling, not suitable for children under 3 years old
